name: Conversant Asia-Pacific
aka: Epsilon Data Management, EpsiSingapore, Commission Junction, Dotomi, AS25751
notes:
Conversant generally requires:
- Peering with both routers at exchanges
- An up-to-date and complete peering record on PeeringDB.com
- Peering be maintained at all IXPs in common

Conversant uses regionally-scoped ASNs for peering.   PeeringDB records for those ASNs are maintained individually as PDB migrates away from allowing per-IXP ASN overrides.
